ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., <18 years, 18-29 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comorbidities" (
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comorbidity */,
  "comorbidity_name" TEXT /* Name of the comorbidity (e.g., Diabetes, Hypertension) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the comorbidity (e.g., Mild, Severe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comorbidity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comorbidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_status" (
  "covid_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the COVID status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the COVID status (e.g., Infected, Recovered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the COVID status */,
  "infection_date" TEXT /* Date of COVID-19 infection */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of COVID-19 recovery */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of COVID-19 test used (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mortality record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who died */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "comorbidity_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the comorbidities table */,
  "autopsy_results" TEXT /* Results of the autopsy */,
  "death_cause_description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_comorbidity_id FOREIGN KEY ("comorbidity_id") REFERENCES comorbidities ("comorbidity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diabetes_data" (
  "diabetes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the diabetes record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diabetes diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for diabetes */,
  "medication_list" TEXT /* List of medications for diabetes */,
  "hemoglobin_a1c" REAL /* Hemoglobin A1c level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diabetes_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hypertension_data" (
  "hypertension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hypertension record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of hypertension diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for hypertension */,
  "medication_list" TEXT /* List of medications for hypertension */,
  "blood_pressure_readings" TEXT /* Blood pressure readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hypertension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardiovascular_data" (
  "cardio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cardiovascular record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of cardiovascular disease diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for cardiovascular disease */,
  "medication_list" TEXT /* List of medications for cardiovascular disease */,
  "cardiovascular_risk_factors" TEXT /* Cardiovascular risk factors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronic_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the chronic condition record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the chronic condition */,
  "condition_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the chronic condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the chronic condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obesity_data" (
  "obesity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the obesity record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "waist_circumference" REAL /* Waist circumference */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage */,
  "weight_management_plan" TEXT /* Weight management plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obesity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time of last logout */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES role_permissions ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, clinician) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
